$comment: SS0 (saas-secrets-sync): non-secret declaration of the runtime secrets each worker requires per environment. Names only — values live in AWS Secrets Manager at the escrowPath. This file is the source of truth the `wrangler secret put` comments in each wrangler.template.jsonc point at; tooling/secrets-sync/check.mjs validates escrow payloads and deployed secret names against it.

deferred.reason: saas-integrations D1 — GitHub App not yet registered; move these to `required` when it lands
